name: Scary / Horror Visual Change
description: Generic preset for increasing scary/horror/gothic visual feel while keeping full-body reference match. Not outfit-specific.

0.query: Bild 1 before drop: full-body standing person matching reference pose, neutral or less scary style

1.query: Bild 2 after drop: full-body standing person with scarier darker horror gothic look
must: scary horror gothic dark creepy visual style

relations.name: scary
positive: scary horror gothic creepy dark ominous visual style
negative: cute cheerful bright friendly casual style

pair_reranker.query: Choose the best before/after pair. Both images must be full-body standing and match reference pose/camera. Prefer a strong visual change where IMAGE 2 becomes scarier, darker, gothic or horror-like compared to IMAGE 1. Reject cropped, lying, sitting, or low-quality images.
